# function: parsetree

Takes a map keyed by delimited paths (e.g. `a/b/c`) and returns a list of objects describing each node in the tree. Intermediate path prefixes that are not present as explicit keys are synthesized with an empty value. Each object contains: `base_path` (leaf segment name), `path` (full delimited path, unique), `parent_path` (full path of parent, or `""` for roots), and `value` (the string value from the input map, or `""` for synthesized intermediates). The output list is sorted lexicographically by `path`.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
parsetree(paths map of string, delimiter string) list of object
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `paths` (Map of String) Map keyed by delimited path with string values.
1. `delimiter` (String) Delimiter used to split path keys into segments. Must be non-empty.
